warheads.name: 20 kt Fission Warhead
warheads.description: NK's earliest proven warhead design. 2006-2013 tests ranged 0.5-7 kt. Current miniaturized est. 15-20 kt.

warheads.name: 100 kt Boosted Fission
warheads.description: Tested Sept 2017 with ~140-250 kt yield. May be true thermonuclear stage. NK ICBM primary warhead.

warheads.name: Thermonuclear Warhead
warheads.description: Claimed thermonuclear capability post-2017. Designed to fit Hwasong-15/17. Est. 100-250 kt.

warheads.name: KN-23 Tactical Warhead
warheads.description: Compact tactical warhead for KN-23 short-range missiles. 2023 announcement of tactical nuke tests.

delivery_systems.name: Hwasong-17 (KN-22)
delivery_systems.description: NK's largest ICBM. Can reach all of CONUS. Liquid-fueled, road-mobile. 22-25 m length. 9-axle TEL.

delivery_systems.name: Hwasong-15 (KN-22B)
delivery_systems.description: Operational ICBM capable of reaching all of US mainland. Tested Nov 2017. Fully operational 2018.

delivery_systems.name: Hwasong-14 (KN-20)
delivery_systems.description: First NK ICBM to reach CONUS range. Two successful tests 2017. Range reaches Alaska/Hawaii/west coast.

delivery_systems.name: Hwasong-12 (KN-17)
delivery_systems.description: IRBM targeting Guam and US Pacific bases. Extensively tested over Japan 2017. Operational.

delivery_systems.name: KN-23 Iskander-type SRBM
delivery_systems.description: NK's most accurate SRBM. Quasi-ballistic, low-altitude trajectory evades THAAD. Targets South Korea.

delivery_systems.name: KN-24 ATACMS-type SRBM
delivery_systems.description: Short-range ballistic missile similar to US ATACMS. Solid-fueled, rapid-fire. Targets South Korea.

delivery_systems.name: Pukguksong-3 SLBM
delivery_systems.description: Sea-based solid-fuel SLBM for Sinpo-class SSBN. Tested 2019. Provides limited second-strike option.
